column1: #  Used by the GitHub Actions zaproxy/action-baseline step:
#  FAIL  = finding causes pipeline build failure (blocker)
#  WARN  = finding is reported but does not fail the build
#  IGNORE = finding is suppressed entirely from the report
#  Find rule IDs: ZAP → Alerts tab → right-click → Alert ID
# ── Rules that FAIL the build (High severity — must fix) ─────

column4: # Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled
# X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing (treat as FAIL for this demo)
# Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set
# Incomplete or No Cache-control Header Set
# Information Disclosure — Sensitive Information in URL
# Information Disclosure — Sensitive Information in HTTP Referrer Header

column1: # ── Rules to IGNORE for this demo environment ─────────────────
# (These are expected/intentional in a local dev setup)
